theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Fits the dense data requirements of a Gas Cylinder Management System. Focuses on clarity, high contrast for legacy FoxPro users transitioning to web, and objective functional design without decorative clutter.

headings.usage: Used for all page titles, card headers, and stat numbers. Avoids standard SaaS fonts to create authoritative industrial tension.

body.usage: Used for tables, forms, and general UI as explicitly requested for high legibility.

tables.header_row: bg-slate-50 border-y border-slate-200 text-slate-600 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider
tables.pagination: flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 border-t border-slate-200 bg-white

forms.input_style: h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-blue-500

buttons.primary: h-9 px-4 py-2 inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 shadow-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: h-9 px-4 py-2 inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors
buttons.danger: h-9 px-4 py-2 inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors

badges.style: inline-flex items-center rounded px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ring-1 ring-inset

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-64 bg-slate-900 text-slate-300 z-40 flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.topbar: fixed top-0 right-0 left-64 h-14 bg-white border-b border-slate-200 z-30 flex items-center justify-between px-6 shadow-sm

dashboard_grid.stats_row: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6

icons_and_assets.sizing: w-4 h-4 for inline UI, w-5 h-5 for sidebar, w-8 h-8 for stat cards

company_logo.description: Modern clean geometric logo for the industrial gas company
company_logo.usage: Sidebar top header, login page brand logo

login_background.description: Abstract architectural photograph of an industrial facility
login_background.usage: Split screen login page background image (right half)

empty_state_1.usage: Use selectively for empty states or dashboard banners if required, otherwise keep UI data-focused

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI components for Tables, Forms, Select, Dialogs, Cards, Badges, and Recharts/Shadcn Charts for the Dashboard.
Data Density is Critical: Override Shadcn default paddings on tables and inputs. Use compact heights (h-8 or h-9) and tight cell paddings (px-3 py-2) to fit more data on screen.
Form constraints: Use grid layouts for Master Entry and Transaction forms. Never use single column full-width inputs for dense data.
Ensure all monetary amounts use Indian formatting (INR ₹) and dates use DD/MM/YYYY format across all tables and forms.
DO NOT use Inter for Headings. Use IBM Plex Sans for H1, H2, H3, and Stat Numbers. Use Inter ONLY for body, tables, and form inputs as requested by user.

Strictly adhere to the color palette: Avoid pastel 'startup' colors. Keep borders sharp (max rounded-md). Use the exact status colors provided for cylinder statuses (Full=Success/Green, Empty=Warning/Amber, Defective=Danger/Red).
Must add `data-testid` to all interactive elements, following the format role-based kebab-case (e.g., `login-submit-button`, `nav-link-dashboard`).
Sidebar must be fixed left, dark theme (Slate 900), and topbar fixed top, light theme (White).
DO NOT implement custom HTML advanced interactions. Use Shadcn components for Select, DatePicker, and Menus.
